---
id: get-property-extras
title: "Get property extras/add-ons"
description: "Retrieve bookable extras and add-ons for a property such as dogs, cots, high chairs, and log baskets. Returns a map keyed by extra type with pricing and quantity limits. Use this to display optional extras during the booking flow."
sidebar_label: "Get property extras/add-ons"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get property extras/add-ons"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/extras"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve bookable extras and add-ons for a property such as dogs, cots, high chairs, and log baskets. Returns a map keyed by extra type with pricing and quantity limits. Use this to display optional extras during the booking flow.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
